jobDescription: You will love this job! Roblox is defining the next-generation entertainment and gaming, with 90 million monthly active users. You will be doing really exciting (and intellectually stimulating) legal work around the world. Work with the most passionate, visionary, and crazy-smart people you’ll ever meet. Fun place to work. Incredible opportunity for the right person. Location: San Mateo, California Your Legal Background: Privacy work - Preferably in a consumer facing business. Applying law to a Product - You have ample experience translating the law to something product people or business person can take action on. Relevant work - GDPR, COPPA, technology, contracts, software, social network, games, and privacy work. Contracts - you are a master drafts-person. In-house experience - You thrive in an in-house environment and you know how to work with different departments within a company to get stuff done. Top law school and top university. Certification - Privacy certifications are a plus.  Who You Are: Very smart. You can boil complex issues down to the bottom line and give advice that can be operationalized (as opposed to legal theory). Goal-oriented, Own it and Get it done. You will be a mini- CEO of your legal work. Achieve those goals. You will need to take responsibility for your work, be self-organized and get it done. Multitasker. Comfortable shuffling/shifting priorities on a dime. Super organized. Extreme attention to detail and stellar follow through. Really nice. Our legal team is. You need to be as well. A good sense of humor is a major plus. Excited and passionate. You have the potential to be part of a company that is truly redefining entertainment.  You'll Love: Excellent medical, dental, and vision coverage A rewarding 401k program Flexible vacation policy Free catered lunches five times a week and several fully stocked kitchens with unlimited snacks Onsite fitness center and fitness program credit Annual Cal Train Go Pass
